overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character leaving a back alley after interacting with NPCs at a game table, then walking through a sunlit urban plaza and along a busy city street beneath an elevated highway in Night City. The clip features futuristic architecture, neon signage, palm trees, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

player raises both arms in celebration or victory gesture
player sits down at the table to join the game

segments.scene_description: In a narrow teal-walled back alley, the player approaches a folding table where two NPCs are playing a board game. The player celebrates with raised arms, then sits down to join them. The space is enclosed with a metal door and circular window visible, lit by an artificial wall-mounted light.

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a bright open plaza area
moves from shaded alley into bright direct sunlight causing exposure shift

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward the main street, passing concrete planters and illuminated vending machines

notable_agents.action: child in blue pants standing near a rectangular concrete planter

entered.detail: purple and pink illuminated vending machines lined against the building wall
large rectangular concrete planters containing small vegetation
large digital screen displaying a boxing match advertisement
tall curved skyscraper with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alley into a bright sunlit urban plaza with teal building walls on the left. Purple vending machines and concrete planters dot the area. A large digital billboard displays a boxing match as the player walks toward a busy intersection, with a modern glass skyscraper rising in the background.

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians
moves onto sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy street and continuing to walk along the sidewalk under the overpass, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic blue car driving along the multi-lane road
man in business suit walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows over the street
sleek futuristic cars with neon accents driving and parked along the road
suspended traffic lights and street signs above the intersection
large illuminated neon advertisements on building facades under the overpass
tall palm trees lining the street against the futuristic skyline

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a busy multi-lane street with futuristic traffic, then walks along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The area is shaded with mixed lighting, featuring neon building signs, palm trees, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity. The modern glass skyscraper looms larger as the player progresses down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, dimly lit back alley into the expansive, sun-drenched urban sprawl of Night City. It begins in a narrow teal-walled alley where the player celebrates and sits at a folding table with two NPCs under the glow of an artificial wall light. As the player leaves the enclosure, the scene opens into a bright urban plaza filled with purple vending machines and concrete planters, while a large digital billboard displaying a boxing match comes into view. The camera then follows the player across a busy multi-lane street with futuristic traffic, shifting from the open sunlight into the shaded area beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Finally, the movement continues along a sidewalk lined with neon signs and palm trees, with a towering glass skyscraper looming larger in the background as the player progresses down the street.
